Name: Average time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time from Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time from Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in cases that later experience a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR when preceded by Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION versus when preceded by Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to be done after Request Payment appears in the same case (to detect anomalies or out-of-order execution)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Request Payment grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in cases that eventually lead to a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in a re-submission loop
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR compared to the elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR after Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time of Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants where the supervisor also acts as budget owner (i.e., no separate Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER activity occurs)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Payment Handled in cases that previously had a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER versus those that did not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in variants that include a prior rejection by any role
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'", 'end': "activity == 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity == 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' or activity == 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' or activity == 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' or activity == 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' or activity == 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' or activity == 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'"}"

Name: Total time it takes Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in cases that do not contain any rejection activity
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'", 'end': "activity == 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity != 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'"}"
